CRC 3.740 REVIEW - JUDGMENT ON FILE

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT STEVEN LOUIE'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT CONTINUED FROM MAY-29-2014 TO LAW AND MOTION AT JUN-02-2014, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 303. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING RE: DEFENDANT STEVEN LOUIE'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. JUDGE GOLDSMITH IS RECUSED. THIS MOTION IS TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 303 BEFORE JUDGE KRAMER ON JUNE 2, 2014 AT 9:30 AM. THE COURT WILL NOT PROVIDE A COURT REPORTER FOR THIS HEARING. IF ANY PARTY WISHES A REPORTER, THE PARTIES MUST MEET AND CONFER AND AGREE ON A SINGLE REPORTER. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED
FEE PAID FOR EX PARTE APPLICATION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT AND ORDER THEREON FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jun-02-2014 Denied

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-29-2014 Continued To Jun-02-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 303
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling re: DEFENDANT STEVEN LOUIE's MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Judge Goldsmith is recused. This motion is to be heard in Department 303 before Judge Kramer on June 2, 2014 at 9:30 am. The court will not provide a court reporter for this hearing. If any party wishes a reporter, the parties must meet and confer and agree on a single reporter. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
